title: Email and activities in a custom crm sales board
excerpt:
Hello, I am using the crm Sales product and I have been using the mass email tool, but when I wanna see the email and activities widget in each lead, it doesn’t appears. 
I’m currently using a custom board, it’s not a cr…

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am using the crm Sales product and I have been using the mass email tool, but when I wanna see the email and activities widget in each lead, it doesn’t appears.

I’m currently using a custom board, it’s not a crm Sales template

image1820×914 54.3 KB

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JoseV you have to add the emails and activities item card view;
First select the top right … menu and click 'edit layout & content.
Then a ‘+’ will appear next to the views on the left side of this card;
click the ‘+’ and select emails and activities app

From there you can resize; add more to that view etc…

hope that helps!

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you very much, it worked for me! I figured that in the layout and content editing it should be able to be added, but I think that having to press the plus sign is not so intuitive.

Thank you very much!
